items.title: Kenvue Inc. (KVUE): A Bull Case Theory
items.description: We came across a bullish thesis on Kenvue Inc. on Danny’s Substack by Danny Green. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on KVUE. Kenvue Inc.’s share was trading at $18.66 as of February 19th. KVUE’s trailing and forward P/E were 24.93 and 17.01, respectively according to Yahoo Finance. items.title: Middleby Is Spinning Off Its Food Processing Segment After a $540 Million Asset Sale. Can the Breakup Close Its Valuation Gap?
items.description: Middleby is splitting up, and the sum-of-the-parts math looks promising if margins cooperate.
